analyze.quality_intro: Here's the content quality score for your project:
analyze.seo_intro: Here's the SEO analysis of your content:
analyze.stale_intro: Here are entries that haven't been updated in over 90 days:
brain.cache_info: I have full awareness of your project content — {entryCount} entries across {modelCount} models.
branch.merged: Branch merged successfully. Content changes are now live.
branch.rejected: Branch rejected. Changes have been discarded.
content.saved_review: Content saved to review branch. A team member with reviewer access can approve or reject the changes.
init.success: Project initialized! Content structure is ready. You can start adding models and content.
media.upload_failed: Image upload failed. You can use an external URL (Unsplash, etc) directly in the content field instead.
media.uploaded: Image uploaded, optimized, and variants generated. Use the path in your content fields.
model.created: Model created successfully. You can now add content entries.
model.deleted: Model and all its content deleted.
search.no_results: No matching content found. Try different keywords or check the model name.
upgrade.alternative: In the meantime, here's what you can do on your current plan:
upgrade.free_to_pro: This feature is available on the Pro plan ($12/mo). Pro includes CDN delivery, Asset Manager with image optimization, review workflow, and 500 AI messages/month. You can upgrade in your workspace settings.
upgrade.pro_to_team: This feature is available on the Team plan ($29/mo + seats). Team includes Conversation API for bot integration, REST API, outbound webhooks, and custom AI instructions. You can upgrade in your workspace settings.
